contentfulTextarea.textContent:
about me

i am an artist-at-heart, a taurus, and a graduate from NYU's [Interactive Telecommunications Program](https://tisch.nyu.edu/itp "NYU ITP Website") as of spring 2020. previously, i've worked as a product designer at [Codecademy](https://www.codecademy.com/ "Codecademy website") and [Girls Who Code](https://girlswhocode.com/ "Girls Who Code Website"), and studied computer science at [MIT](http://www.mit.edu/ "MIT's Website"). i am an interdisciplinary artist/designer/technologist, driven by the cultural change that emerges when we work outside the silos of disciplines. i'm particularly excited by how art and design can be modes of intervention into dominant narratives of technology and society. as a __designer__ who's worked in CS education, i'm interested in ways to transform gate-keeped fields, like programming, to be more accessible, inclusive, and human - weaving a commitment to sociocultural awareness in the design for user needs. as an __artist__, i'm interested in co-opting technological processes to carve space for radical vulnerability and sensitivity - all within a self-reflective, speculative, and research-based practice. finally, as a __technologist__ with a 5+ year background in web programming, i specialize in implementing interactive, web-based experiences - bringing interventions to life with meticulous care. i'm open to opportunities for freelance or full-time work, artistic collaboration, or having a coffee or bubble tea. don't be afraid to [get in touch](https://jackieis.online/#contact "Contact me")!
view my résumé



### exhibition - __[Computer Mouse Conference](https://www.computermouseconference.net/ "Computer Mouse Conference site")__, [CURSORWORLD](https://jackieis.online/projects/cursorworld "CURSORWORLD portfolio page") · participatory art exhibit · November 2019 - __[PRIMER19](https://2019.primerconference.us/exhibition "PRIMER 19 Exhibition Website")__, [ENIAC Girlz](https://jackieis.online/projects/eniac-girlz/ "ENIAC Girlz project page") · poster presentation · July 2019 - __[ NYU ITP Spring Show](https://itp.nyu.edu/shows/spring2019/ "NYU ITP Spring Show")__, [ENIAC Girlz](https://jackieis.online/projects/eniac-girlz/ "ENIAC Girlz project page") · speculative design · May 2019 - __[NYU ITP Fall Show](https://itp.nyu.edu/shows/winter2018/ "NYU ITP Fall Show")__, The Body Pillow · speculative design · December 2018 - __Museum of the Moving Image__, [a collaboration w/ my 12-year-old self](https://jackieis.online/projects/collaboration-with-12-year-old-self "a collaboration w/ my 12-year-old self project page") · performance · December 2018 - __MIT Hacking Arts__, [love notes](https://jackieis.online/projects/lovenotes "love notes project page") · Exhibiting artist · November 2017 ### publication - [__In Medias Res: MIT Comparative Media Studies / Writing Magazine__](https://cmsw.mit.edu/wp/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/In-Medias-Res-2018.pdf "In Media Res Fall 2018 PDF"), [Girl Meets Void](https://medium.com/@jackieleeliu/girl-meets-void-a-painted-memoir-about-being-sad-and-then-being-a-bit-less-sad-c3323c78f891 "Girl Meets Voiid") · Comic memoir · Fall 2018 ### speaking - __[Tech for Social Good Day](https://techforsocialgood.rocks/ "Tech for Social Good Day site")__, "Dark/Net/Art: an Introduction to Self-Publishing with Tor" · workshop w/ [Cezar Mocan](https://cezar.io "Cezar Mocan") · February 2020 - __BUFU WYFY School__, "Website Design as Personal Storytelling" · workshop · August 2019 ### awards - __AniMIThon Winner__, [backspace](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_lODuMKc7QQ "backspace Youtube link") · animated film · May 2018 - __[MIT Anthropology James Howe Prize](https://anthropology.mit.edu/undergraduate/howeprize "MIT Anthropology James Howe Prize")__, "Clashing Colors, Blinking Backgrounds, Under-Construction Signs: GeoCities’ Aesthetic Legacy and the Future of Web Culture" · essay · May 2018
